name: Logo Cloud
description: A section displaying partner, client, or technology logos in a horizontal row or animated marquee. Supports grayscale-to-color hover effects and infinite scroll animation.
whenToUse: Use to display trusted brands, partners, or certifications. Often placed below the hero section for credibility.

props.name: logos
props.description: Array of logo objects with src, alt, and optional href

props.name: animated
props.description: Whether to animate logos in a continuous marquee

props.name: grayscale
props.description: Show logos in grayscale with color on hover
